title: Stop depending on github.com/opencontainers/runc
body:
We only use a single 9-line function, so replace that with a local (and improved) version.

This will allow us to remove the dependency on runc, and avoid the bureaucy of investigating and documenting how we (don't need to) handle unrelated vulnerabilities in that codebase.

Cc: @kolyshkin @TomSweeneyRedHat 

Following up on https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/781 . There is also a caller in Buildah (potentially benefiting from making the new function public), I’ll leave that one to others, incl. the decision whether the code should live in c/common or Buildah proper.

comments.body: ELN job failure is odd. Don't see that on other recent PRs, nor on skopeo. Maybe a retrigger would solve it if it matters.
For peace of mind, I did re-run the ELN job and it passed.
